Description: Most loyal and valuable customers who frequently purchase and engage with your brand.
Marketing Action: Reward with loyalty programs, exclusive previews, or priority access to new products/services.

Description: Regular customers who consistently engage with and purchase from your brand.
Marketing Action: Maintain engagement through personalized communication, loyalty programs, and occasional rewards.

Description: Customers with growing interest and engagement, indicating a potential to become loyal.
Marketing Action: Nurture with personalized offers, recognition, and incentives to solidify their loyalty.

Description: New or occasional customers with good potential based on recent behavior.
Marketing Action: Encourage further engagement with special offers, tailored content, or invitations to loyalty programs.

Description: First-time buyers who recently started engaging with your brand.
Marketing Action: Onboard with welcome emails, educational content, or incentives for repeat purchases.

Description: Customers who have purchased before but have shown declining engagement or inactivity.
Marketing Action: Send personalized re-engagement campaigns, offer discounts or reminders about their previous activity.

Description: Customers who were once active but have not engaged in a significant period.
Marketing Action: Reactivate through targeted campaigns, reminders of past purchases, or enticing offers.

Description: Customers with decent engagement but show early signs of decreasing interest or activity.
Marketing Action: Monitor closely, offer encouragement to stay engaged with personalized recommendations or support.

Description: Customers with reduced frequency of purchase or engagement, indicating potential churn.
Marketing Action: Offer incentives such as loyalty rewards or exclusive promotions to encourage retention.

Description: High-value customers with recent inactivity or signs of disengagement.
Marketing Action: Provide VIP treatment, personalized outreach, or exclusive offers to rekindle their loyalty.

Description: Customers who have completely stopped engaging despite prior activity.
Marketing Action: Conduct win-back campaigns or surveys to understand reasons for disengagement and address concerns.
